summary: Verified #85537 remains open and is the live canonical issue for the WSL/Linux source-checkout protobufjs descriptor build failure. #88487 is the best hydrated non-security canonical fix PR candidate, but it is draft and this job blocks merge/fix actions. #85711 is preflight-marked security-sensitive and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
